commit_message:
Depracate U50D

Various minor synthesis fixes:
- HBM split for non-U55C cards
- Syntax error for user clock domain crossing
- Remove redundant (partial) bitstreams: .bin for cyt_top and .bit for shell

examples.commit_message:
Depracate U50D

- HBM split for non-U55C cards
- Syntax error for user clock domain crossing
